mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE company_id = #{companyId} AND status IN ('a2', 'a3')
AND (LOWER(login_id) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{keyword}) || '%' OR LOWER(user_name) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{keyword}) || '%' OR LOWER( CASE WHEN NVL(owner_yn, 0) = 1 THEN '최고관리자' WHEN NVL(admin_yn, 0) = 1 THEN '관리자' ELSE '일반 사용자' END ) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{keyword}) || '%')

SELECT u.user_code AS userCode, u.login_id AS loginId, u.user_name AS userName, u.email AS email, u.phone_number AS phoneNumber, u.profile_image AS profileImage, u.status AS status, TO_CHAR(u.create_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS createdAt, TO_CHAR(u.last_login_time, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS lastLoginTime, g.group_name AS groupName, NVL(u.owner_yn, 0) AS ownerYn, NVL(u.admin_yn, 0) AS adminYn, CASE WHEN NVL(u.owner_yn, 0) = 1 THEN '최고관리자' WHEN NVL(u.admin_yn, 0) = 1 THEN '관리자' ELSE '일반 사용자' END AS roleName FROM users u LEFT JOIN groups g ON u.group_id = g.group_id WHERE u.company_id = #{companyId} AND u.user_code = #{userCode} AND u.status IN ('a2', 'a3')

SELECT m.project_id AS projectId, p.project_title AS projectTitle, NVL( LISTAGG(r.role_name, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY r.role_name), '역할 미지정' ) AS roleName FROM members m JOIN users u ON m.user_code = u.user_code JOIN project p ON m.project_id = p.project_id LEFT JOIN member_roles mr ON m.member_id = mr.member_id LEFT JOIN roles r ON mr.role_id = r.role_id AND r.company_id = u.company_id WHERE u.company_id = #{companyId} AND u.user_code = #{userCode} GROUP BY m.project_id, p.project_title ORDER BY p.project_title ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE UPPER(email) = UPPER(#{email})
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE UPPER(email) = UPPER(#{email}) AND user_code != #{userCode}
mapper.insert:
SELECT 'USR-' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') || '-' || ( NVL( MAX( TO_NUMBER( SUBSTR( user_code, LENGTH('USR-' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') || '-') + 1 ) ) ), 0 ) + 1 ) FROM users WHERE user_code LIKE 'USR-' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') || '-%' AND REGEXP_LIKE( SUBSTR( user_code, LENGTH('USR-' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') || '-') + 1 ), '^[0-9]+$' )
INSERT INTO users ( user_code, company_id, login_id, password, user_name, email, phone_number, create_date, status, owner_yn, admin_yn, web_notification_yn, email_notification_yn, notification_area ) VALUES ( #{userCode}, #{companyId}, #{loginId}, #{password}, #{userName}, #{email}, #{phoneNumber}, SYSDATE, 'a2', 0, CASE WHEN #{adminYn} = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, #{webNotificationYn}, #{emailNotificationYn}, 'ALL' )
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET login_id = #{user.loginId}, user_name = #{user.userName}, email = #{user.email}, phone_number = #{user.phoneNumber}, admin_yn = CASE WHEN #{actorOwnerYn} = 1 THEN CASE WHEN #{user.adminYn} = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ELSE admin_yn END WHERE company_id = #{companyId} AND user_code = #{user.userCode} AND status IN ('a2', 'a3') AND (#{actorOwnerYn} = 1 OR (NVL(owner_yn, 0) = 0 AND NVL(admin_yn, 0) = 0))
